title: Software Update - Release Notes link
scenario: Verify that clicking the Release Notes link in Device Settings > Software Update displays a popup with release notes when a firmware update is available.
steps: Ensure the headset is not on the latest firmware.
Navigate to Device Settings > Software Update.
Click on the Release Notes link (the blue firmware version next to 'Update Available').
expected: A popup with release notes appears, working similarly to the release notes link on the device home page.
